infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: ForgeTrack needs camera access to capture before/after photos of jobs.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: ForgeTrack needs location access for job site check-ins and GPS tracking.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: ForgeTrack needs background location for job site geofencing.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: ForgeTrack needs microphone access for voice notes.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: ForgeTrack needs photo library access to save job photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: ForgeTrack needs to save photos to your library.
